description: Generate release notes for Flipt summarizing API changes, breaking changes, and new features
local_clone_commands: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f.git . && git config user.email "agent@example.com" && git config user.name "Agent"

git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt.git . && git checkout 3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8 && git config user.email "agent@example.com" && git config user.name "Agent"
dependency_hints: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl python3 ripgrep && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
